title: Jordan Thompson (rugby league)
extract:
Jordan Thompson (born 4 September 1991) is a professional rugby league footballer who plays as a second-row or loose forward for the York Knights in the Super League.
He has previously played for the Castleford Tigers in the Super League, and on loan from Castleford at the York City Knights in the Championship. Thompson has also played for  Hull FC, in two separate spells and the Leeds Rhinos in the Super League. He has also previously played for Leigh in the Championship. Earlier in his career he played as a centre, fullback and on the wing.
